results.title: Toy Story
results.why_similar: It features inanimate objects (toys) coming to life and working together, sharing a theme of teamwork and overcoming rivalry to save their world, much like the LEGO characters.

results.title: The Super Mario Bros. Movie
results.why_similar: It's a fast-paced, colorful adventure where a group of characters must team up to save their kingdom, emphasizing teamwork and self-belief, similar to the ensemble quest in The LEGO Movie.

results.title: Phineas and Ferb the Movie: Candace Against the Universe
results.why_similar: It centers on boundless creativity and invention to solve problems and rescue a friend, mirroring the imaginative, can-do spirit of The LEGO Movie's protagonists.

results.director: Bob Persichetti, Peter Ramsey, Rodney Rothman
results.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
results.why_similar: It features a young hero teaming up with alternate versions of himself, learning to embrace his unique journey with mentorship and teamwork, paralleling Emmet's journey of self-discovery and collaboration.

results.title: The Sword in the Stone
results.why_similar: A young, ordinary boy is mentored to use creativity and cleverness over strength to discover his destiny, similar to Emmet's transformation from a nobody to a 'Special' through unconventional thinking.

results.title: The Incredibles
results.why_similar: A family of superheroes must learn to combine their unique powers and work as a team to defeat a villain, echoing The LEGO Movie's core message that everyone has a special role to play in a collective effort.

results.title: Big Hero 6
results.why_similar: A young tech genius forms a superhero team with friends, using creativity and science to solve problems, mirroring the inventive, build-anything spirit and team formation of The LEGO Movie.

results.title: Meet the Robinsons
results.why_similar: It follows a young inventor who learns to embrace failure and keep moving forward, sharing the optimistic, creative problem-solving and 'everything is awesome' forward-looking attitude of The LEGO Movie.

results.title: Wreck-It Ralph
results.why_similar: A character defined by his role in one world journeys to others to prove he can be more, learning about self-worth and teamwork, similar to Emmet breaking out of his prescribed life to become a hero.

results.title: Treasure Planet
results.why_similar: It shares themes of a young, underestimated protagonist embarking on a grand, imaginative adventure and forming an unexpected father-son bond with a mentor figure.

results.title: Klaus
results.why_similar: It centers on a cynical, by-the-book character whose life is transformed by creativity, community, and the power of building something new and joyful.

results.title: The Brave Little Toaster
results.why_similar: It features a group of quirky, personified objects on a perilous journey to reunite with their owner, highlighting loyalty and teamwork against the odds.

results.director: Jack Kinney, Clyde Geronimi, James Algar
results.title: The Adventures of Ichabod and Mr. Toad
results.why_similar: It presents two classic tales of eccentric characters embarking on wild, imaginative adventures driven by their obsessions and fears.

results.title: Paddington 2
results.why_similar: It champions relentless optimism, kindness, and the power of community to overcome adversity, much like the spirit of 'Everything is Awesome'.

results.title: The Dragon Prince
results.why_similar: It follows a group of young heroes on a quest to unite divided worlds, focusing on building trust, overcoming prejudice, and epic, imaginative storytelling.

results.title: Puss in Boots: The Last Wish
results.why_similar: It's a fast-paced, self-referential adventure where a legendary hero learns to value friendship and legacy over solo glory, with a vibrant, stylized animation.

results.title: Home
results.why_similar: It shares themes of an unlikely friendship challenging established norms and finding one's place in the world, similar to Emmet's journey in The LEGO Movie.

results.title: Cars
results.why_similar: It features a self-centered protagonist who learns humility and the value of community, mirroring the personal growth and teamwork themes in The LEGO Movie.

results.title: The Sea Beast
results.why_similar: It involves a character who questions a rigid, authoritative system and forges an unexpected bond, echoing the themes of challenging conformity and finding one's own path.

results.title: Onward
results.why_similar: It follows a quest driven by a deep personal connection and the bond between siblings, paralleling the heartfelt adventure and family themes in The LEGO Movie.

results.title: The Magician's Elephant
results.why_similar: It features an ordinary protagonist who embarks on an extraordinary, seemingly impossible quest fueled by hope and community support, much like Emmet's journey.

results.title: Monsters, Inc.
results.why_similar: It revolves around characters who discover that their world's foundational belief (scaring/laughter) is wrong, leading to a revolution in thinking, similar to the subversion of expectations in The LEGO Movie.

results.title: Lilo & Stitch
results.why_similar: It features a chaotic, unconventional outsider who forms a heartfelt family bond, similar to Emmet and Wyldstyle's found family in a rigid world.

results.title: The Mitchells vs. The Machines
results.why_similar: It combines a quirky, creative protagonist with frenetic, meta humor and a story about individuality versus conformity, much like The LEGO Movie.

results.director: Ron Clements, John Musker, Don Hall, Chris Williams
results.title: Moana
results.why_similar: It follows an ordinary, rule-following protagonist who embarks on a grand, world-saving adventure with an unlikely, charismatic partner.

results.title: Nimona
results.why_similar: It centers on a chaotic, creative force challenging a rigid, oppressive system, mirroring the rebellion against Lord Business's perfect order.

results.title: Finding Nemo
results.why_similar: A cautious, rule-following parent embarks on an epic journey with a forgetful but loyal companion, learning to let go and embrace adventure.

results.title: Up
results.why_similar: It pairs a grumpy, set-in-his-ways protagonist with an endlessly optimistic and creative young companion on a fantastical adventure.

results.title: Bolt
results.why_similar: A character who believes he is a special hero discovers the real world is more complex, learning about true friendship and self-worth on a journey.

results.director: Sarah Smith, Jean-Philippe Vine, Octavio E. Rodriguez
results.title: Ron's Gone Wrong
results.why_similar: It explores themes of creativity, authentic friendship, and rebellion against corporate-controlled conformity in a tech-saturated world.
